detection_rule: core ids and polyp slots must be unique across partitions
max shard id must be <= MCPL_KEY_SHARD_MASK
required_response: increase key width or reduce static partitions

detection_rule: per-partition lookup requests must equal replies
required_response: do not proceed to 4.32c; repair MCPL routing/readback

detection_rule: quad partition plus dedicated lifecycle requires 17 cores
required_response: choose distributed lifecycle ownership or move lifecycle owner to another chip

detection_rule: current evidence maps polyp slots to partition groups, not one polyp to one chip
required_response: keep docs/claims at group/module/slot mapping level

detection_rule: readback must include partition/shard/core role enough to reconstruct ownership
required_response: add partition id fields before hardware packaging

detection_rule: board/chip id is not represented in current single-chip partition map
required_response: define board/chip/routing key fields in 4.32c before first multi-chip smoke
